overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a survival or horror video game, featuring dense vegetation and dark forest surroundings with no other characters present.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through dense tall grass at night. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing brown and green vegetation on both sides and a dark tree line to the left. The environment is isolated with no other agents present.

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the same narrow trail as a prominent tree trunk emerges from the left tree line and is approached and passed. The flashlight illuminates the rough bark of the tree as the camera moves past it, returning to the dense grass corridor. The environment remains consistently dark and isolated throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a desolate night trail that transitions from a corridor of dense grass to a close encounter with the forest edge. It begins with a walk down a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to reveal thick brown and green vegetation flanking the trail. As the camera advances, the light catches the dark tree line to the left, gradually bringing a prominent, rough-barked tree trunk into focus. The scene then shifts as the camera passes closely by the tree, momentarily illuminating its texture before moving back into the isolation of the grassy corridor. Finally, the path continues forward into the oppressive darkness of the surrounding woods.
